**Analyzing strike announcement**

The announcement states it's proclaimed by an organization from 19:40 to 23:40, citing issues related to corporate organization. So, yes, this is an upcoming strike. I need to format the dates properly in 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss', which will be 2025-03-22 19:40:00 to 2025-03-22 23:40:00. It seems to be at a national or regional level.
